given: a warehouse operator viewing the SKU detail screen for a stock position whose batch has no value
then: the batch field shows an explicit "none" state rather than a blank region or a crash, while its serial field is unaffected

independence.rationale: AC1 and AC2 use a row with a populated batch; this AC adds the distinct outcome that a missing batch renders an explicit "none" instead of a blank region or crash. The missing-batch path could break (blank or crash) without affecting the populated-row rendering of AC1 or the retirement of the combined code in AC2.
